mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSF_REQUEST_CANCEL WHERE (PROC_CD IS NULL OR PROC_CD != 'BK') AND CANCEL_MOBILE_NO = #{mobileNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('sq_request_key')
INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_CANCEL ( REQUEST_KEY, MANAGER_CD, AGENT_CD, OPER_TYPE_CD, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, CANCEL_MOBILE_NO, CONTRACT_NUM, CSTMR_NM, RECEIVE_WAY_CD, RECEIVE_MOBILE_NO, CANCEL_USE_COMPANY_CD, PAY_AMT, PNLT_AMT, LAST_SUM_AMT, INSTAMT_MNTH_AMT, BENEFIT_AGREE_YN, CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_YN, ETC_AGREE_YN, MEMO, REG_DATE, REGST_ID, REG_DT, PROC_CD, CRET_DT, CRET_ID ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{managerCd}, #{agentCd}, #{operTypeCd}, #{cstmrTypeCd}, #{cancelMobileNo}, #{contractNum}, #{cstmrNm}, #{receiveWayCd}, #{receiveMobileNo}, #{cancelUseCompanyCd}, #{payAmt}, #{pnltAmt}, #{lastSumAmt}, #{instamtMnthAmt}, #{benefitAgreeYn}, 'Y', 'Y', #{memo}, TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), #{regstId}, NOW(), #{procCd}, NOW(), #{regstId} )
mapper.select: SELECT REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey, CANCEL_MOBILE_NO AS cancelMobileNo, CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum, CSTMR_NM AS cstmrNm, CSTMR_TYPE_CD AS cstmrTypeCd, PAY_AMT AS payAmt, PNLT_AMT AS pnltAmt, LAST_SUM_AMT AS lastSumAmt, CANCEL_USE_COMPANY_CD AS cancelUseCd, PROC_CD AS procCd, TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regDt, AGENT_CD AS agentCd, SCAN_ID AS scanId, COALESCE(APP_FORM_YN, 'N') AS appFormYn, RES_NO AS mcpCustReqSeq FROM MSF_REQUEST_CANCEL WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

SELECT REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey, CANCEL_MOBILE_NO AS cancelMobileNo, CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum, PROC_CD AS procCd, RES_NO AS mcpCustReqSeq FROM MSF_REQUEST_CANCEL WHERE PROC_CD = 'RC' ORDER BY REQUEST_KEY ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
